subject: Escalation: signs of marsupial urban takeover in North America | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-4157
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in North America. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Pablo Picasso as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-4157. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
